title: Is AI taking over human brains? Man using AI for work says 'I have started mimicking LLMs'. Internet replies 'you are not alone'
description: A viral Reddit post has sparked discussion after a user shared that heavy use of AI tools has started influencing their own writing style. The user said they now notice themselves using structured, AI-like patterns such as “it is not X, it is Y,” and can even identify traces of AI influence in their speech and writing. The post led to widespread responses from others who said they are experiencing similar changes due to frequent interaction with large language models.
